data.title: Shanghai prosecutors report on virtual currency fraud case: 8 people sentenced for inducing investors to fully leverage transactions
data.description: According to the Yangpu District Procuratorate in Shanghai, the procuratorate has disclosed a virtual currency fraud case. The case revealed that an eight-member fraud ring colluded with a virtual currency investment platform, posting low-price exchange information on social media to attract victims. They then impersonated "cryptocurrency experts" and sent fake profit screenshots to gain their trust. The ring induced victims to trade with full leverage on a designated platform and manipulated the market to cause margin calls, earning commissions from the platform based on the investors' losses. The case involved numerous individuals and involved significant amounts of money. In March 2025, the Yangpu District Procuratorate indicted Peng Moumou and eight others for fraud. Between April and May, the court sentenced them to prison terms ranging from one to five years and imposed fines. Prosecutors reminded that virtual currencies do not have the same legal status as legal tender, and related investment transactions are not protected by law. Investors should manage their finances through formal channels.

data.title: U.S. President Trump Highlights Stock Market Strength Amid Tariff Policies
data.description: According to PANews, U.S. President Donald Trump has stated that the stock market is stronger than ever due to the current tariff policies. This assertion comes amid ongoing discussions about the impact of tariffs on the economy and financial markets. Trump's comments reflect his administration's stance on trade and economic strategy, emphasizing the perceived benefits of the tariff measures in bolstering market performance.

data.title: Tether Data Launches AI Research Tools for STEM Model Training
data.description: According to Foresight News, Tether Data's AI research division, QVAC, has unveiled a synthetic dataset named QVAC Genesis I, designed for training AI models with a focus on STEM fields. Additionally, Tether Data introduced its first consumer application, QVAC Workbench, which serves as a comprehensive workspace showcasing the potential of AI on local devices. The target audience for QVAC Workbench includes AI enthusiasts, advanced users, and researchers. The application supports various large language models (LLMs) and other AI models, such as Llama, Medgemma, Qwen, SmolVLM, and Whisper. It is compatible with smartphones (currently available on Android, with iOS support expected in a few days) and desktop platforms (Windows, macOS, and Linux), offering the most extensive device support compared to existing products.

data.title: Thai regulators raid World iris scanning site in latest headache for Sam Altman
data.description:
Thailand’s SEC raids World’s iris scanning site over unlicensed WLD token operations, raising legal concerns for Sam Altman’s digital identity project.
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/thai-regulators-raid-world-iris-scanning-site-in-latest-headache-for-sam-altman?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss%3F_nocache%3D1761306629344%26noCache%3Dtrue&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: World's Digital Identity Project Faces Regulatory Challenges in Thailand
data.description:
According to Cointelegraph, OpenAI CEO Sam Altman's digital identity initiative, World, previously known as Worldcoin, is encountering regulatory hurdles in Thailand. Local authorities recently conducted a raid on an iris scanning facility allegedly linked to the platform. This operation was carried out by Thailand's Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) in collaboration with the Cyber Crime Investigation Bureau (CCIB), targeting a location associated with 'WLD exchange services,' as announced by the SEC on Friday.

World's native cryptocurrency, the WLD token, is distributed to eligible users who verify their identity through iris scanning at designated orb locations. The platform reportedly operates 102 such locations across Thailand. However, the SEC and CCIB have raised concerns that the WLD exchange service provider may have violated local digital asset regulations by operating without the necessary license. The authorities have taken action against suspects involved in these activities, with further legal proceedings anticipated.

World maintains that it only distributes WLD tokens in regions where legal frameworks permit such activities. The platform's website specifies that eligibility for receiving WLD tokens is subject to geographical, age, and other criteria. Additionally, World disclaims responsibility for the availability of WLD tokens on third-party platforms, whether centralized or decentralized exchanges. Cointelegraph reached out to Tools of Humanity, the developer behind World, for comments on the raid, but no response was received by the time of publication.

data.title: JPMorgan Chase upgraded Coinbase's rating to "overweight" and raised its target price to $404.
data.description: JPMorgan Chase raised its rating on Coinbase's stock from "neutral" to "overweight" and raised its target price from $342 to $404. The bank noted that although Coinbase's stock price has risen by about 30% this year, it remains attractive compared to its peers, and the revised model shows that there is still about 25% room for growth. JPMorgan analyst Kenneth Worthington said that Coinbase is evaluating the possibility of issuing Base tokens, which may become an important catalyst for promoting ecological expansion. He estimates that the token's market value may be between $12 billion and $34 billion, which is expected to balance shareholder value and community growth. At the same time, Coinbase's promotion of monthly subscription services is also seen as a potential growth driver. (CNBC)

data.title: Crypto treasuries siphon $800B from altcoins, and it might be ‘forever’
data.description:
Corporate crypto treasuries have attracted around $800 billion from retail investors, mainly at the expense of altcoins, according to 10x Research.
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/crypto-treasuries-siphon-800b-from-altcoins-and-it-might-be-forever?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss%3F_t%3D1761305418089%26ttl%3D0&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Glassnode: Bitcoin ETF fund flows turn positive or indicate the market is entering a recovery phase
data.description: According to Glassnode data, Bitcoin spot ETF fund flow trends show that net outflows typically occur during local market lows and periods of low sentiment. When fund flows stabilize or turn back to net inflows, this historically signals a recovery in market demand and the early stages of a recovery.

data.title: The “100% Win Rate Whale” added another 100 BTC to its long position, bringing its total position to over $162 million.
data.description: According to crypto analyst Aiyi @ai_9684xtpa, the "100% Win Rate Whale" from October 11th to date has added another 100 BTC long position today, bringing its total position size to over $162 million. Current holdings include: BTC long position: 280.3 BTC, valued at approximately $31.17 million, with an opening price of $110,971.3; ETH long position: 33,270.78 ETH, valued at approximately $132 million, with an opening price of $3,897.59. In addition, the address also placed a limit buy order for 100 BTC at $111,100, with a value of approximately $11.11 million.

data.title: BTC and ETH Long Positions Surpass $200 Million
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, on-chain analyst Ai Yi has reported that the scale of BTC long positions has exceeded $75 million, with total positions surpassing $200 million and an accumulated unrealized profit of $1.62 million.

The BTC long position holds 680.3 BTC, valued at $75.46 million, with an opening price of $110,971.3. Meanwhile, the ETH long position consists of 33,270.78 ETH, valued at $132 million, with an opening price of $3,897.59.

data.title: OG ‘Satoshi era’ wallet moves 150 Bitcoin after 14.3 years of dormancy
data.description:
A long-dormant Bitcoin wallet dating back to the earliest days of the network has suddenly come back to life, moving 150 Bitcoins after being inactive for over 14 years. Blockchain transactions tracker Lookonchain reported on Thursday that a “Satoshi-era” Bitcoin address, one active since 2009, transferred Bitcoin worth more than $16 million in its first […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/satoshi-era-wallet-moves-bitcoin/

data.title: Australian Crypto Adoption Outpaces US, Data Shows
data.description:
Australia’s crypto adoption rate reached 31% in 2025, up from 28% in 2024, putting the nation among the world’s most crypto-engaged populations, as mobile wallet usage indicators show activity more focused on trading and speculation than in other developing countries, according to a16z’s State of Crypto 2025 report. The findings come as crypto’s total market […]
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/australian-crypto-adoption-outpaces-us-data-shows/
